message:
Sync VERSION file to 1.2.3 to match installer script

The VERSION file was still at 1.2.0 after the installer was bumped
to 1.2.3 in commit 59c46ae. The CI workflow's version-check job
(ci.yml, lines 115-144) compares these two values and fails if they
diverge, and the release workflow (release.yml, lines 38-49) refuses
to create a release when the tag doesn't match the script VERSION.

This sync is required before tagging any new release. The VERSION
file serves as the single canonical version source for external tools
(like the ACFS checksum updater) that need to read the version without
parsing the shell script.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
